svg.title: Smart Tennis Field — Data Flow
svg.desc: Vertical data flow from Siddha Dataset through SiddhaDatasetLoader, siddha-sensor-sim, EMQX broker, ingest-service, to InfluxDB 3 with Explorer UI side connection.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the Siddha dataset and what does it contain?')
sendPrompt('What does SiddhaDatasetLoader do in the simulator?')
sendPrompt('How does siddha-sensor-sim publish data over MQTT?')
sendPrompt('What is EMQXs role as MQTT broker in this system?')
sendPrompt('How does ingest-service process incoming MQTT messages?')
sendPrompt('How is IMU data stored in InfluxDB 3?')
sendPrompt('What is the InfluxDB 3 Explorer UI used for?')
sendPrompt('What is the InfluxDB 3 Explorer UI used for?')
